docket_entries.description: ORDER TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE ISSUES.
ORDER OF EXAMINAION IS OFF CALENDAR - NO PROOF OF SERVICE
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT KURAGG LLC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,191.00 FILED BY SHARED LLC AS TO DEFENDANT KURAGG LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-13-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHARED LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KURAGG LLC $3,191.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,241.00, PLAINTIFF SHOWED THAT LEASE REQUIRED DEFENDANT TO PAY MONTHLY RENT AND PROVIDE 30 DAYS NOTICE. NEITHER HAPPENED WITH REGARDS TO 9/22-10/22 RENT OWED. DEDUCTIONS WERE REASONABLE AGAINST THE SECURITY DEPOSIT FOR DAMAGE TO SPACE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF CURRENT ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT KURAGG LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-13-2022 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE ISSUES TO FEB-06-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SHARED LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARILYN YU, SALES MEMBER. DEFENDANT KURAGG LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JEREMY BRAGG, PRESIDENT OFFICER. NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-06-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-06-2023 BY JUDGE PANG LY. PLAINTIFF SHARED LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARILYN YU (OWNER). DEFENDANT KURAGG LLC IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAY-08-2023 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR SHARED LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARILYN LU, SALES MEMBER. DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR KURAGG LLC IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHARED LLC AS TO DEFENDANT KURAGG LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JEREMY BRAGG, PRESIDENT OFFICER FILED BY DEFENDANT KURAGG LLC
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO (THIRD PARTY)JEREMY BRAGG AS TO DEFENDANT KURAGG LLC HEARING SET FOR MAY-08-2023 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$ AMOUNT NOT GIVEN); REMARKS: THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE THE RESPONDENT WAS NOT FOUND. NO ANSWER ON THE THIRD AND FINAL ATTEMPT. ATTEMPTS MADE TO NO AVAIL. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICES LEFT AT THE ADDRESS PROVIDED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHARED LLC AS TO DEFENDANT KURAGG LLC
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $100.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT KURAGG LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARILYN YU, SALES MEMBER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHARED LLC
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHARED LLC

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - W/FICTITIOUS BUSINESS NAME[SC-103];(FEE FOR SERVICE:$NO AMOUNT GIVEN) SERVED OCT-25-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KURAGG LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-06-2023 - JUDGMENT.
